frontend/src/lib/chat/chatConversationsApi.ts — preview text resolved via chatmessage lookup; no adapter passthrough

functional_audit.check: ConversationSidebar renders thread list with IR bubble markers ai_RNbBHXbK/bL and per-cell ai_RNbBHXbM hierarchy
Thread list loads current-user chatconversation rows via Supabase client ordered by modified date
Selecting a thread cell updates /chat?conversation=<id> while preserving other URL search params
Delete control (bU) opens DeleteConversationPopup with the selected chatconversation bound
Empty repeating group bootstraps first chatconversation and navigates to ?conversation=<new_id> (bTInQ/bTInY/bTInW)

ui_evidence.notes: RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref not applied — Tailwind overflow-y-auto only
Active conditional bg-accent on cell root matches IR selected-state intent
Select button carries title + preview spans; IR bP is Button with dynamic text bindings
Button_icon_ style via bubbleStyle; rename handler is no-op stub in Chat.tsx
IR list RG style exists in styles.json but ai_RNbBHXbL container has no data-style-ref or bubbleStyle(RepeatingGroup_list_)

critiques.finding: fetchConversations and createConversation fall back to profiles.onboarding_data when chatconversation/chatmessage tables are absent (supabase has no chat migrations). AC-2 names table query only.
critiques.alternative: Land supabase chatconversation migration so the primary Supabase table path is always exercised; keep onboarding fallback only for migration rollout.

critiques.finding: Rename trigger ai_RNbBHXbS is wired through onRenameRequest but Chat.tsx handleRenameRequest is an intentional no-op — icon renders without opening a rename flow.
critiques.alternative: Defer to a rename-popup item or wire inline title edit; document as out-of-scope in decompose if rename is not required for CHAT-02 gate.

critiques.finding: Repeating group ai_RNbBHXbL omits RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref from ir/slices/styles.json (border/background list presentation).
critiques.alternative: Apply bubbleStyle('RepeatingGroup_list_') or equivalent token mapping on the RG scroll container.

critiques.finding: useEmptyConversationBootstrap sets bootstrappedRef before async createConversation completes; a failed create will not retry on subsequent renders.
critiques.alternative: Set bootstrappedRef only after successful create, or reset on failure with user-visible error toast.
